title: cavendishia divaricata
intro: Cavendishia divaricata is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the 'Wild Apple' due to its edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cavendishia divaricata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Cavendishia divaricata is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to consume its medicinal properties, and its fruit is edible and consumed raw.
